scripts.dev:website: npx concurrently -k -n cms,frontend -c blue,cyan "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.dev:stack: npx concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -k -n cms,backend,frontend -c blue,yellow,cyan "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install -w apps/frontend && npm install -w apps/backend
